steps.t: Radagast has suggested that you should return to Caras Tilion, in the mountains on the southern border of Eryn Lasgalen.
Caras Tilion can be found in the mountains on the southern border of Eryn Lasgalen. The Rhachló must flow through Caras Tilion.
Caras Tilion can be found in the mountains on the southern border of Eryn Lasgalen. Search Caras Tilion for dark artifacts.
Caras Tilion can be found in the mountains on the southern border of Eryn Lasgalen. Search Caras Tilion for anything from Dol Guldur that isn't broken…
Radagast can be found at the tree nursery just outside of Felegoth. You should return to Radagast and tell him all that you saw in Caras Tilion.
Radagast can be found at the tree nursery just outside of Felegoth. You should return to Radagast and tell him all that you saw in Caras Tilion.
